prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类最低位次约 18452→18754→18473→23596→22609，2024 年因选科要求调整（物化绑定）出现大幅后移约 5100 名，2025 年小幅回升约 1000 名，近两年波动较大；2025 年基准约 22609 名；本省物理类计划 2021–2025 年依次为 83→85→89→96→97 人，持续小幅扩招；2026 年计划 107 人，较 2025 年扩招约 10.3%，扩招幅度明显，对竞争有缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜约第 76 名（2026 年），近年排名稳定在 69–77 区间，属中上水平行业特色校；2026 年声誉评价为中性/混合，无重大负面舆情；抖音热度未进入全国前 100，关注度一般；2022 年曾因师德师风事件有偏负面评价，但影响已消退；安全科学与工程 A+、测绘科学与技术 A-、土木工程 A-（参考中国矿业大学体系），矿业工程为传统王牌，与招生专业中的安全科学与工程类、测绘类、土木工程等直接对应。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电气工程、电子信 息等热门专业社会热度持续高位，矿大（北京）的计算机、电气等专业录取位次常年居前；本省物理类考生 2021–2025 年从 14.7 万增至 25.0 万，2026 年总考生约 39.37 万，按近年物理类占比约 63.8% 估算约 25.1 万人，较 2025 年略有增加，较 2024 年 437 分略降；学校位于北京，对湖北考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在湖北招生人数占比较小（约 100 人级），属跨省招生，地域偏好对位次影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次近两年波动较大、2026 年扩招约 10.3%（已通过供需弹性反映）、本省物理类考生略有增加、热门工科专业持续升温等因素，预测最低位次约 24038 名，区间 23538–24538 名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 计算机科学与技术（公办）
- 电气工程及其自动化（公办）
- 人工智能（公办）
- 新能源科学与工程（公办）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 机械类（机械工程、机器人工程）（公办）
- 智能制造工程（公办）
- 数学类（数学与应用数学、信息与计算科学）（公办）
- 测绘类（测绘工程、遥感科学与技术）（公办）
- 工程力学（公办）
- 安全科学与工程类（安全工程、消防工程、应急技术与管理）（公办）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 土木工程（公办）
- 化学工程与工艺（公办）
- 地质类（地质工程、资源勘查工程）（公办）
- 环境工程（公办）
- 矿物加工工程（公办）
- 工商管理类（工商管理、会计学、大数据管理与应用）（公办）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间 23538–24538 名内，建议以二档专业为主攻方向（安全科学与工程类 A+、测绘类 A-、数学类等），一档热门专业（计算机、电气、人工智能）可作为冲刺选择，三档专业（土木、化工、地质等）作为保底。位次明显优于区间下限（如 23000 名以内）可重点冲击一档王牌专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 18452→18754→18473→23596→22609. In 2024, due to adjustments in subject selection requirements (physics-chemistry binding), there was a significant drop of about 5100 places, with a slight recovery of about 1000 places in 2025, showing considerable fluctuation in the past two years. The baseline for 2025 is about 22609. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plans from 2021 to 2025 were 83→85→89→96→97 students, with continuous small expansions. The 2026 plan is 107 students, an increase of about 10.3% compared to 2025, a significant expansion that helps alleviate competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking approximately 76th (2026), with stable rankings in the 69–77 range in recent years, belonging to an upper-middle level industry-specific school. The 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion. Douyin popularity not in the top 100 nationally, with average attention. In 2022, there was a somewhat negative evaluation due to a teacher ethics incident, but the impact has faded. Safety Science and Engineering A+, Surveying and Mapping Science and Technology A-, Civil Engineering A- (referencing the China University of Mining and Technology system), Mining Engineering is a traditional flagship, directly corresponding to enrollment majors such as Safety Science and Engineering, Surveying and Mapping, and Civil Engineering.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, and Electronic Information continue to have high social popularity. The admission rankings for Computer Science and Electrical Engineering at CUMTB (Beijing) are consistently high. The number of Physics Category examinees in the province increased from 147,000 in 2021 to 250,000 in 2025, with total examinees in 2026 approximately 393,700. Estimated at about 251,000 based on the recent Physics Category proportion of about 63.8%, a slight increase compared to 2025, and a slight decrease from the 2024 score of 437. The school is located in Beijing, which has strong regional appeal for Hubei examinees. The enrollment number in Hubei is relatively small (about 100 students), belonging to cross-provincial enrollment, with limited impact of regional preference on rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant fluctuations in historical rankings over the past two years, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 10.3% (already reflected through supply-demand elasticity), a slight increase in provincial Physics Category examinees, and the continued heating up of popular engineering majors, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 24038, with a range of 23538–24538.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

- Mineral Processing Engineering (Public)
- Business Administration Class (Business Administration, Accounting, Big Data Management and Application) (Public).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 23538–24538, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Safety Science and Engineering Class A+, Surveying and Mapping Class A-, Mathematics Class, etc.) as the main direction, with Tier 1 popular majors (Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, Artificial Intelligence) as reach choices, and Tier 3 majors (Civil Engineering, Chemical Engineering, Geology, etc.) as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 23000), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年历史类最低位次约 3877→4107→4334→4652→4516，整体呈后移趋势，近 5 年累计后移约 640 名；2025 年较 2024 年略有回升（从 4652 升至 4516），基准约 4516 名；本省历史类计划 2021–2025 年依次为 10→11→7→9→9 人，2023 年缩减后近两年稳定在 9 人；2026 年计划 9 人，与 2025 年持平，无扩缩变化。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜约第 76 名（2026 年），属理工类院校，历史类招生专业较少（仅行政管理、英语 2 个），整体层次对文科生吸引力中等；2026 年声誉评价为中性/混合，无重大负面舆情；抖音热度未进入全国前 100，关注度一般；该校以工科为主，历史类招生。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 英语属外语类，2024 年专业热度评估为一般观望，热度平稳；本省历史类考生 2021–2025 年从 14.9 万降至 12.4 万再回升至 14.1 万，2026 年总考生约 39.37 万，按近年历史类占比约 36.2% 估算约 14.3 万人，较 2025 年略有增加，较 2024 年 432 分略升。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次整体后移趋势、2026 年招生计划持平、本省历史类考生略有增加、学校文科专业吸引力一般等因素，预测最低位次约 4541 名，区间 4041–5041 名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 行政管理（公办）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 英语（公办）（只招英语语种考生）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 历史类仅设 2 个招生专业，位次在预测区间 4041–5041 名内，行政管理（一档）和英语（二档）位次差距极小，建议按个人兴趣选择；位次明显优于区间下限可优先考虑行政管理。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 3877→4107→4334→4652→4516, showing an overall backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 640 places over the past 5 years; in 2025, it slightly rebounded compared to 2024 (from 4652 to 4516), with a baseline of about 4516; the provincial History Category enrollment plan from 2021 to 2025 was 10→11→7→9→9 students respectively, stabilizing at 9 students in the last two years after a reduction in 2023; the 2026 plan is 9 students, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; approximately 76th on the Soft Science main ranking (2026), a science and engineering institution with few History Category majors (only Administrative Management and English, 2 majors), with moderate overall appeal to liberal arts students; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion; Douyin popularity not in the national top 100, with average attention; the school is primarily engineering-oriented, with History Category enrollment.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: English is a foreign language major, with a 2024 popularity evaluation of generally wait-and-see, stable popularity; provincial History Category examinees from 2021 to 2025 decreased from 149,000 to 124,000 then rebounded to 141,000, with total examinees in 2026 about 393,700, estimated at about 143,000 based on the recent History Category proportion of about 36.2%, a slight increase compared to 2025, slightly higher than the 432 score in 2024.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the overall backward trend of historical rankings, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, a slight increase in provincial History Category examinees, and the average appeal of the school's liberal arts majors, the predicted minimum ranking is about 4541, with a range of 4041–5041.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- English (Public) (only accepts English language examinees).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: History Category has only 2 enrollment majors, with rankings within the predicted range of 4041–5041. The ranking difference between Administrative Management (Tier 1) and English (Tier 2) is minimal, so it is recommended to choose based on personal interest; if the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range, Administrative Management can be prioritized.
